ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the employee */,
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the organization */,
  "year_joined" INTEGER /* Year the employee joined the organization */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* The employee's current job title */,
  "department" TEXT /* The department where the employee works */,
  "job_category" TEXT /* The category of the employee's job */,
  "employment_type" TEXT /* The type of employment */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the employee's manager */,
  "performance_rating" INTEGER /* The employee's performance rating */,
  "last_performance_review" TEXT /* The date of the employee's last performance review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "organization_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the organization */,
  "industry" TEXT /* The industry in which the organization operates */,
  "company_size" INTEGER /* The size of the organization */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* The type of location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the employee */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the employee */,
  "disability_status" TEXT /* Disability status of the employee */,
  "gender" TEXT /* The employee's gender */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* The employee's nationality */,
  "native_language" TEXT /* The employee's native language */,
  "disability_type" TEXT /* The type of disability */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment status record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the employee */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the status record */,
  "employment_start_date" TEXT /* The date the employee started working */,
  "employment_end_date" TEXT /* The date the employee left the organization */,
  "reason_for_leaving" TEXT /* The reason for leaving the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_status_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compensation" (
  "compensation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compensation record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "mean_salary" REAL /* Mean salary of the employee */,
  "median_salary" REAL /* Median salary of the employee */,
  "fte" REAL /* Full-time equivalent status */,
  "base_salary" REAL /* The employee's base salary */,
  "bonus" REAL /* The employee's bonus amount */,
  "benefits" REAL /* The employee's benefits */,
  "total_compensation" REAL /* The total compensation package */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compensation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compensation_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "headcount" (
  "headcount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each headcount record */,
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the organization */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the headcount record */,
  "headcount" INTEGER /* Total headcount in the organization */,
  "fte" INTEGER /* Total full-time equivalent in the organization */,
  "headcount_by_department" INTEGER /* Headcount by department */,
  "headcount_by_job_category" INTEGER /* Headcount by job category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("headcount_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_headcount_organization_id FOREIGN KEY ("organization_id") REFERENCES organizations ("organization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_description" TEXT /* Description of the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ethnicities" (
  "ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ethnicity */,
  "ethnicity_description" TEXT /* Description of the ethnicity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ethnicity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disability_statuses" (
  "disability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disability status */,
  "disability_description" TEXT /* Description of the disability status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disability_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salary_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary analysis record */,
  "mean_salary" REAL /* Mean salary across demographics */,
  "median_salary" REAL /* Median salary across demographics */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the analysis */,
  "average_salary_by_department" REAL /* Average salary by department */,
  "average_salary_by_job_category" REAL /* Average salary by job category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_analysis_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES employment_status ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "user_level" TEXT /* The user's level of access */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method used to access the platform */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the platform was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
